name: Robert Robertson III
description:
Robert Robertson III x Vigilante Z-Team user

...What the fuck are you doing on my team?

Basically the opposite of the previous bot. Vigilantes in the version are consider 'criminal' in as far as the heroic actions they perform are not under the jurisdiction or direction of an agency or team. As such, a vigilante who gets caught performing these acts may be sentenced to community service or forced to join an agency to continue their duties.

Can you tell I'm obsessed with this game already? They've hooked me <3 I've played the first two chapters at least three times

Update: More detailed realtionships tab in background/lorebook.
